medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Posterior distal radius swelling, increasing in size with growth. Angular deformity related to intra-articular lesions of the wrist and knee.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Negative family history of bone dysplasia.

physical_examination.specialty_examination: Posterior distal radius lesion leading to immediate instability of the wrist. Lesion of carpal ligaments and dorsal capsular distension.
